component.name: IptvLoadTask
component.script:
sub init() m.top.functionName = "execute" end sub
sub execute() request = m.top.request if request = invalid then response = Iptv_EmptyCatalogResponse("No provider was requested.") response.metadata = { stage: "request_missing" } m.top.response = response return end if
provider = invalid if request.DoesExist("provider") then provider = request.provider if provider = invalid then response = Iptv_EmptyCatalogResponse("No provider was requested.") response.metadata = { stage: "provider_missing" } m.top.response = response return end if
m.top.response = IptvCatalogService_LoadProvider(provider) end sub
